# `semver` for [filters](/commands/categories/filters.md)

<div class='command-title'>Various commands for working with semantic versions.</div>

## Signature

```> semver {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input   | output |
| ------- | ------ |
| nothing | string |
## Notes
You must use one of the following subcommands. Using this command as-is will only produce this help message.

## Subcommands:

| name                                           | description                                | type     |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ | -------- |
| [`semver bump`](/commands/docs/semver_bump.md) | Bump a semantic version to the next level. | built-in |
